name: image-background-remover
description: Remove image backgrounds and save transparent PNG outputs from an AI agent.

interface.shortDescription: Remove backgrounds and create transparent PNGs.
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin when a user asks to remove an image background, isolate a subject, cut out a product or person, or create a transparent PNG from a local image or image URL.
defaultPrompt: Use Image Background Remover to remove the background from ./product-photo.jpg and save a transparent PNG.
Use Image Background Remover to make the background transparent for this image URL: <image-url>.
